log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kor — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kor — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kor — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Kor — Unarmored Caster HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Kor — Unarmored Caster HP: 30/67
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 15] MISS.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kor — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 30/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Kor — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 30/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Young Red Dragon (disadvantage protects concentration).
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 173/178

REASONING: Multiattack on Kor — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kor — Unarmored Caster

→ Concentration save: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Kor — Unarmored Caster HP: -3/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
